title: Tilda - Monday - sending an email depending on the content of the text field

posts.author: Shnex (Evgeny Schnider)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all! Sorry for the bad English - I’m writing through a translator)) Please help me solve the problem! Set up integration with Tilda. Information from Tilda forms comes in a text field. How to set up sending email depending on the content of the text field? Thank you all very much for your help!
